---
title: "About"
---

![](assets/ruggero.png){width=200 style="border-radius: 8px; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;"}

## Background

<!-- Replace with your own narrative -->

I am a data scientist and consultant with a background in computational biophysics. After
completing my PhD and several years in academic research, I transitioned into management
consulting — working with higher education and research institutions on data strategy and
analytics. I now focus on applied machine learning, AI systems, and data engineering for
pharma and biotech clients.

## What I do

| Area | Details |
|------|---------|
| **Data science & ML** | End-to-end ML pipelines, predictive modelling, model deployment |
| **AI systems** | LLM applications, retrieval-augmented generation, agent frameworks |
| **Scientific computing** | Biophysics modelling, genomics data analysis |
| **Consulting** | Analytical strategy for pharma and biotech organisations |

## Education

| Degree | Institution | Year |
|--------|-------------|------|
| PhD, Biophysics | *[Institution]* | *[Year]* |
| *[Degree]* | *[Institution]* | *[Year]* |

## Skills

**Languages:** Python · R · SQL · Julia
**ML / AI:** scikit-learn · PyTorch · LangChain · Hugging Face
**Data engineering:** dbt · Airflow · Spark
**Cloud:** AWS · GCP
**Tools:** Git · Docker · Quarto

---

Outside work I enjoy photography, fantasy cartography, and tabletop role-playing games.
